hero_description: Uzbekistan is a treasure trove of ancient civilizations and a witness to great history. Samarkand, Bukhara, and Khiva reveal millennia of secrets through magnificent architecture and art.
subject: Subject
gallery_empty_desc: Try different keywords or clear the search — hundreds of monument photos are waiting for you.
feature_history_desc: Cities shaped by the Great Silk Road, ancient bazaars and heritage — a new story at every step.
feature_arch_desc: Registan, madrasahs and minarets — masterpieces of the East in one glance.
feature_food_desc: Plov, samsa, shashlik and dolma — a generous and flavourful table.
feature_hospitality_desc: The warm welcome of Uzbek homes turns every trip into a memorable experience.
city_not_found_desc: The slug in the URL is not in our list. Check the spelling (e.g. samarkand, bukhara).
map_direction_hint: Open the map in a new tab for the exact address and directions.
